title: ASR Outdoor 15.5" Black Stainless Steel Machete Recurve Blade and Serrated Spine
description:
Blaze trails while you're hunting or camping with the ASR Outdoor 15.5" Fixed Recurve Blade Serrated Spine Machete. This full tang machete is constructed from 440 stainless steel in full black and features a recurved zigzag serrated spine on the back of blade. The overall length of the machete is 15.5 inches, with the usable length of the blade being 9.5 inches and 3mm thick. The curved handle is wrapped with black paracord which can be useful in an emergency situation as a means to tie/pull/hang/secure just about anything using the paracord. The blade comes with a black fitted nylon sheath with hook and loop belt fastener, and there's also a lanyard hole with lanyard for easy carrying when not in use.
